word: H1774 - דִּי זָהָב - Dîy zâhâb - dee zaw-hawb' - Dizahab

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּי זהב

Transliteration: dı̂y zâhâb

Phonetic: dee zaw-hawb'

BDB Definition:

Dizahab = "enough gold"
  1. a place on the border of Moab

Origin: as if from H1768 and H2091

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
